name: Hidden Felines Ellara
short_description: This hidden object game provides a relaxing experience as you search for 100 hidden felines tucked away in a carefully crafted hand-drawn setting.
detailed_description:
Hidden Felines Ellara is a charming hidden object game where you explore a carefully crafted, hand-drawn isometric world in search of 100 hidden felines. With its cozy atmosphere and peaceful soundtrack, immerse yourself in a relaxing experience as you uncover each cat tucked away in the detailed environment.

Gameplay & Controls

  • Save Progress: Automatically saves, so you can continue anytime.

  • Camera Movement: Use W, A, S, D or the arrow keys

  • Pan: Click and hold the left mouse button, then drag

  • Edge Panning: Move the cursor to the screen edges

  • Zoom: Adjust with the scroll wheel
